content:
# Recommendations вҖ” next plan iter (post iter-054)

## State: B1/B2 engine + tensor-flank S2 DONE. Sorry 4 in `TensorObjInverse.lean`.
S2 `tensorObj_restrict_iso_restrict_compat` CLOSED (verified `lake build` EXIT 0). The B1-route
template is now PROVEN to work on the tensor flank. 4 sorries remain:
S3 (L1088), S4a (L1113), S4b (L1129), `trivialisation_restrict_compat` (L1201).

## CRITICAL вҖ” the two genuine remaining blockers are MISSING INFRASTRUCTURE, not proof tactics
Both need a fresh construction of B1-comparable depth before any prove lane can succeed. Do NOT send
a bare prove lane at S3/S4a/S4b вҖ” they will fail for lack of the lemma, not lack of effort.

1. **Dual-B1 cone (gates S3 + S4a).** The dual analogue of Bridge B1 вҖ”
   `pullbackDualMap` / internal-hom base-change cone вҖ” does NOT exist (grep-empty:
   `pullbackDualMap`, `internalHomPullback`, `dual_restrict_iso_eq`). This is the dual twin of the
   `pullbackTensorMap` base-change. **Action:** decide the dual-flank route (planner's deferred fork):
   (a) build the `pullbackDualMap` cone (mirror of the tensor B1 construction вҖ” substantial but the
   tensor side now validates the pattern), OR (b) the unproven subsingleton route. Recommend
   `strategy-auditor` / `mathlib-analogist` (api-alignment) to confirm the cone shape before a
   `lean-scaffolder` builds it. Then S3/S4a follow the S2 template.

2. **Left-unitor pullback-coherence lemma (gates S4b вҖ” tensor flank's last square).**
   `tensorObj_unit_iso = sheafification.map (О»_ рқҹҷ) вү« counit`; S4b needs the immersion-naturality of
   the presheaf left unitor `О»_` under sheafification + `pullbackUnitIso`/`counit` interplay. This is
   the unit analogue of `pullbackTensorMap` base-change. **Action:** scaffold a `presheaf_leftUnitor`
   / pullback-unit-coherence lemma (mathlib-analogist for the monoidal-functor-unit idiom), then S4b
   follows the S2 B1-route template + the 9 reusable helpers from this iter (esp.
   `tensorObj_functoriality_comp3`, the whnf-seam idioms).

3. **`trivialisation_restrict_compat` (L1201)** is the telescope of all 5 squares вҖ” DO NOT assign
   until S3/S4a/S4b land. Gated transitively.

## MEDIUM вҖ” code hygiene (lean-auditor iter054, 6 major; route to next prover on this file)
All stale-narrative / dead-code, NONE a proof defect. Hand to the prover that next touches
`TensorObjInverse.lean` (e.g. the S4b lane):
- **Dead helper pair:** `map_tensorHom_comp2` (L910) + `tensorObj_functoriality_comp` (L917) вҖ” neither
  is called (`tensorObj_functoriality_comp3` is used instead). Either remove, or wire the S2 proof to
  use them. Also fix the comment at L1061 that names the wrong lemma.
- **Stale ESCALATION block** L501вҖ“539 inside the *proved* `hKEY` subproof of
  `sheafPullbackUnit_forget_eq` вҖ” says goal "still open"/"ESCALATED" though the proof closes right
  after. Misleading; delete.
- **Stale STATUS** L830вҖ“841 in `tensorObj_restrict_iso_eq_pullbackTensorMap`: iter-044 clause dead;
  iter-051 clause falsely claims a live dep on `sheafPullbackUnit_forget_eq` (closed iter-053).
- **Iter-number drift** L1341вҖ“1358 in `exists_tensorObj_inverse` docstring (`iter-226/225/218`, parent
  numbering вҖ” outside this subproject's iter-025вҖҰ054 range).
- (Minor) 34 deprecated `Sheaf.val` warnings in the `sheafPullbackUnit_forget_eq` region вҖ” accumulating.

## Coverage debt вҖ” 9 new `lean_aux` nodes need blueprint entries (planner authors prose)
`archon dag-query unmatched` = 114 (was ~105). New this iter, all in `TensorObjInverse.lean`,
all proven/axiom-clean вҖ” each needs a `\label`/`\lean{}`/`\uses` block:
- `tensorObj_functoriality_id` вҖ” `TF (рқҹҷ)(рқҹҷ) = рқҹҷ`.
- `pullbackTensorMap_pullbackCongr` (`@[reassoc]`) вҖ” naturality of `pullbackTensorMap` along
  `pullbackCongr` transport (proved by `subst`).
- `tensorObjIsoOfIso_hom` вҖ” `(tensorObjIsoOfIso e e').hom = tensorObj_functoriality e.hom e'.hom`.
- `map_tensorHom_comp2` вҖ” generic 2-fold `F.map`-tensor interchange. *(but see dead-code note above вҖ”
  may be removed instead of blueprinted)*
- `tensorObj_functoriality_comp` / `_comp3` вҖ” `TF` composes (2-/3-fold). *(`_comp` is dead-code)*
- `natIso_hom_inv_id_app_assoc` вҖ” generic `Оұ.hom.app X вү« Оұ.inv.app X вү« f = f`.
- `pullbackTensorMap_restrict_cancel` (`@[reassoc]`) вҖ” pre-cancelled `pullbackTensorMap_restrict`.
- `restrictFunctorIsoPullback_comp_compat_leg` вҖ” the per-module `(*)` coherence (inverse B2 + `RFIP j`
  inverse naturality) each tensor leg of S2 reduces to.

## DO-NOT-RETRY
- S3/S4a/S4b via bare prove lane with no new lemma вҖ” they are infrastructure-gated (see CRITICAL).
- `erw [Iso.hom_inv_id_app_assoc]` / placeholder-`refine tensorObj_functoriality_comp` on
  `pullbackTensorMap`-laden goals вҖ” whnf-bombs the kernel even at 6.4M heartbeats. Use the
  isolated-helper + fully-applied-`exact` idiom (proven this iter).

## Reusable pattern (added to PROJECT_STATUS Knowledge Base)
The whnf-seam idiom: on sheafification-carrier goals, `exact`/`refine` a FULLY-APPLIED generic lemma
(explicit morphism args) rather than `erw`/placeholder-`refine`; isolate any unavoidable seam `erw`
into a tiny helper discharged by a generic single-`[Category C]` lemma via `exact`.
